paper_title: Material and Methods of Emphytus miocenicus and Empria sammuti

methods.description: This method involves photographing the specimens using specialized equipment and processing the images to create detailed photomicrographic composites.

steps.description: The specimens were studied using a stereomicroscope Nikon SMZ25.
steps.searchable_summary: Use Nikon SMZ25 stereomicroscope to study specimens

steps.description: Photographs were taken with a Nikon D800 mounted on the stereomicroscope or using a Canon 50D with an attached Canon 65 MPE camera lens and mounted on an automated stacking rail (StackShot).
steps.searchable_summary: Capture photographs using Nikon D800 or Canon 50D with stacking rail

steps.description: The photographs were treated with graphic software.
All images are digitally stacked photomicrographic composites of several individual focal planes, which were obtained using Helicon Focus 6.7.
steps.searchable_summary: Create photomicrographic composites using Helicon Focus 6.7

steps.description: The figures were composed with Adobe Illustrator CC2019 and Photoshop CC2019.
steps.searchable_summary: Compose figures using Adobe Illustrator and Photoshop
